SQLLite.SQL: SELECT SE.EVENT_ID As "StandardEventId" , SE.DESCRIPTION As "StandardEventDescription" , SE.CATEGORY As "StandardEventCategory" , DECODE(SE.CATEGORY, 'Q', 'true', 'false') As "MagsEvent" FROM STANDARD_EVENTS SE WHERE SE.CATEGORY IN ('A','E','K','M', 'Q') OR SE.EVENT_ID = '999'

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper
